title: Menagerie
description: A magical menagerie of mystical and mischievous items
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70320e2999f035581957de5634f3b6525249c384.png) **Mark of Dissonance**: Makes the user immune to most negative potion effects. They burn in daylight if not wearing a helmet, and they are granted permanent Soul Speed III activated normally and activated at Night. Equipped by right click. **Mark of the Accursed**: Gives the user 3 extra hearts, permanent Strength I. However, you cannot use regeneration effects, and they will take damage in water. You also will not be able to interact with villagers. Equipped by right click. **Mark of Aqueousness**: Gives the user permanent Dolphin's Grace and Conduit Power and Regeneration when fully underwater, however they have reduced attack range and mining speed on land. Equipped by right click. **Camera of the Otherside**(COTO): When the holder kills another player, that player will placed in chains instead of dying. If the holder decides to seal their victim's fate, the victims soul will be forfeit to the Otherside, becoming property of **~~[THE NAME YOU ARE LOOKING FOR DOES NOT EXIST]~~** **Heavyiron Longspoon**: A gigantic spoon that can be used as a weapon. 11 AD with 0.8 AS, it also gives an additional block of reach when held. When holding right-click, charges a smash attack that sends its targets flying **Enchantments** - Condensed: Doubles the knockback of the Spoon's smash attack - Pogo: Allows the spoon to launch the user opposite of their look direction **Bonesaw**: A bonesaw used as a weapon. 9 AD with 1.2 AS. When holding right-click and within close range of a player, the bonesaw will deal rapid damage to the target **Punch-Up Star**: A gauntlet capable of storing kinetic energy from punches and channeling it into specialized attacks. 4 AD & 3 AS. By default, stored kinetic energy can be used on an entity to send them flying. Every unit of Stored Energy increases the attack damage of this weapon up to a maximum of 10 **Enchantments**: - Bracer: Allows the Punch-Up Star to block incoming attacks when holding right-click - Implosion: Turns the Punch-Up Star's Combo Punch into an explosion with strength proportional to your current combo - Charger: Allows the Punch-Up Star to dash with strength proportional to your current combo when pressing right-click **Reach of the Void**: An item that allows you to reach into a player's ender chest and take one item. One time use **Simulacrum Vessel**: An item that can duplicate non-valuable items. THis is acomplished by putting the Vessel in your main hand and some of the desired item in your offhand
??? The _Camera_ can only be granted by those with higher power, mortals tread not.
